## Tests

- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test
- [ ] `swift test` passes locally for the package(s) touched

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies introduced (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] No telemetry, crash reporting, or background network calls added
- [ ] Style matches surrounding code; no unrelated reformatting
